subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath aided us to recognize the Dawning-Place of His signs, the Dayspring of His evidences, the Manifestation of His commandments and the Source thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ایدنا علی عرفان مشرق آیاته و مطلع بیناته و مظهر اوامره و مصدر
